sentences.target: Ich will mir endlich Kopfhörer anschaffen.

translations.de: Ich will mir endlich Kopfhörer anschaffen.
translations.en: I finally want to get some headphones.
translations.es: Por fin quiero comprar unos audífonos.
translations.fr: Je veux enfin m’acheter des écouteurs.
translations.pt: Finalmente quero comprar uns fones de ouvido.
translations.vi: Cuối cùng tôi muốn mua một cái tai nghe.
translations.nl: Ik wil eindelijk een koptelefoon kopen.
translations.hi: आखिरकार मैं हेडफ़ोन खरीदना चाहता हूँ।
translations.ro: În sfârșit vreau să îmi cumpăr niște căști.
translations.da: Jeg vil endelig købe nogle høretelefoner.
translations.ja: やっとヘッドホンを買いたい。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1sg) expressing volition; takes the infinitive 'anschaffen' as its complement.
1st person singular dative pronoun marking the beneficiary/experiencer in the reflexive-like pattern 'sich/mir etwas anschaffen'.
Temporal/stance adverb modifying the clause, indicating that the action should happen at last.
Direct object (accusative; form identical in sg/pl); item being acquired.
Lexical infinitive headed by the modal; trennbares Verb (separable in finite forms), here unsplit as infinitive.

sentences.target: Wir müssen bald einen neuen Kühlschrank anschaffen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsən balt ˈaɪ̯nən ˈnɔɪ̯ən ˈkyːlʃʁaŋk ˈanʃafən/

translations.de: Wir müssen bald einen neuen Kühlschrank anschaffen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsən balt ˈaɪ̯nən ˈnɔɪ̯ən ˈkyːlʃʁaŋk ˈanʃafən/
translations.en: We need to get a new fridge soon.
translations.es: Tenemos que comprar pronto una nevera nueva.
translations.fr: On doit bientôt acheter un nouveau frigo.
translations.it: Dobbiamo comprare presto un frigorifero nuovo.
translations.ko: 곧 새 냉장고를 하나 사야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得尽快买一台新冰箱。
translations.yue: 我哋要快啲買部新雪櫃。
translations.ru: Нам скоро нужно купить новый холодильник.
translations.pt: Precisamos comprar uma geladeira nova em breve.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לקנות בקרוב מקרר חדש.
translations.tr: Yakında yeni bir buzdolabı almamız gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cần mua một cái tủ lạnh mới sớm thôi.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى شراء ثلاجة جديدة قريبًا.
translations.nl: We moeten snel een nieuwe koelkast kopen.
translations.uk: Нам скоро потрібно купити новий холодильник.
translations.hi: हमें जल्द ही नया फ्रिज खरीदना होगा।
translations.el: Πρέπει σύντομα να αγοράσουμε καινούριο ψυγείο.
translations.nb: Vi må snart kjøpe et nytt kjøleskap.
translations.id: Kita perlu segera membeli kulkas baru.
translations.sv: Vi behöver snart köpa ett nytt kylskåp.
translations.ro: Trebuie să cumpărăm în curând un frigider nou.
translations.cs: Brzy si musíme pořídit novou lednici.
translations.da: Vi skal snart købe et nyt køleskab.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää pian ostaa uusi jääkaappi.
translations.ja: もうすぐ新しい冷蔵庫を買わないといけない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1pl) expressing necessity; selects the infinitive 'anschaffen'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate, indicating near future timing.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Kühlschrank'.
Attributive adjective (accusative masculine singular, mixed declension with 'ein'), modifying 'Kühlschrank'.
Direct object (accusative masculine singular); the item to be procured.
Lexical infinitive complement of the modal; separable verb, here as unsplit infinitive.

sentences.target: Sie will sich ein gebrauchtes Fahrrad anschaffen.
sentences.reading: /ziː vɪl zɪç aɪ̯n gəˈbʁaʊ̯xtəs ˈfaːʁʁaːt ˈanʃafən/

translations.de: Sie will sich ein gebrauchtes Fahrrad anschaffen.
translations.ipa: /ziː vɪl zɪç aɪ̯n gəˈbʁaʊ̯xtəs ˈfaːʁʁaːt ˈanʃafən/
translations.en: She wants to get a used bicycle.
translations.es: Ella quiere comprar una bicicleta usada.
translations.fr: Elle veut s’acheter un vélo d’occasion.
translations.ko: 그녀는 중고 자전거를 하나 장만하고 싶어해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她想买一辆二手自行车。
translations.pt: Ela quer comprar uma bicicleta usada.
translations.he: היא רוצה לקנות אופניים יד שנייה.
translations.tr: O, ikinci el bir bisiklet almak istiyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn mua một chiếc xe đạp đã qua sử dụng.
translations.nl: Ze wil een tweedehands fiets kopen.
translations.hi: वह एक सेकंड हैंड साइकिल खरीदना चाहती है।
translations.nb: Hun vil kjøpe en brukt sykkel.
translations.sv: Hon vill köpa en begagnad cykel.
translations.ro: Ea vrea să își cumpere o bicicletă second-hand.
translations.da: Hun vil købe en brugt cykel.
translations.ja: 彼女は中古の自転車を買いた가っています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject (feminine here by context).
Modal auxiliary (present, 3sg) expressing volition; governs the infinitive 'anschaffen'.
Reflexive pronoun (3rd person; form used for both dative and accusative). Here dative beneficiary in 'sich etwas anschaffen'.
Indefinite article (accusative neuter singular), determiner for 'Fahrrad'.
Attributive adjective (accusative neuter singular, weak/mixed inflection with 'ein'), modifying 'Fahrrad'.
Direct object (accusative neuter singular); the item to be acquired.
Lexical infinitive complement of the modal; separable verb, unsplit in infinitive position.

sentences.target: Im Büro werden wir einen Drucker anschaffen.
sentences.reading: /ɪm byˈʁoː ˈveːʁdən viːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən ˈdʁʊkɐ ˈanʃafən/

translations.de: Im Büro werden wir einen Drucker anschaffen.
translations.ipa: /ɪm byˈʁoː ˈveːʁdən viːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən ˈdʁʊkɐ ˈanʃafən/
translations.en: At the office, we will get a printer.
translations.es: En la oficina vamos a comprar una impresora.
translations.fr: Au bureau, on va acheter une imprimante.
translations.zh-Hans: 在办公室我们会买一台打印机。
translations.yue: 喺辦公室我哋會買部打印機。
translations.pt: No escritório vamos comprar uma impressora.
translations.vi: Ở văn phòng, chúng tôi sẽ mua một cái máy in.
translations.nl: Op kantoor gaan we een printer kopen.
translations.hi: दफ़्तर में हम एक प्रिंटर खरीदेंगे।
translations.el: Στο γραφείο θα αγοράσουμε έναν εκτυπωτή.
translations.nb: På kontoret skal vi kjøpe en printer.
translations.id: Di kantor kami akan membeli printer.
translations.sv: På kontoret ska vi köpa en skrivare.
translations.ro: La birou o să cumpărăm o imprimantă.
translations.da: På kontoret skal vi købe en printer.
translations.ja: オフィスではプリンターを買う予定です。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a locative PP that assigns dative to its object.
Object of the preposition 'im'; dative singular, indicating location.
Auxiliary (present, 1pl) marking future; selects the infinitive 'anschaffen'.
1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Drucker'.
Direct object (accusative masculine singular); the item to be procured.
Lexical infinitive as the main verb, selected by the auxiliary 'werden'; separable verb, here unsplit.

jp: Ich will mir endlich Kopfhörer anschaffen.
Wir müssen bald einen neuen Kühlschrank anschaffen.
Sie will sich ein gebrauchtes Fahrrad anschaffen.
Im Büro werden wir einen Drucker anschaffen.
fu: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsən balt ˈaɪ̯nən ˈnɔɪ̯ən ˈkyːlʃʁaŋk ˈanʃafən/
/ziː vɪl zɪç aɪ̯n gəˈbʁaʊ̯xtəs ˈfaːʁʁaːt ˈanʃafən/
/ɪm byˈʁoː ˈveːʁdən viːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən ˈdʁʊkɐ ˈanʃafən/
de: Ich will mir endlich Kopfhörer anschaffen.
Wir müssen bald einen neuen Kühlschrank anschaffen.
Sie will sich ein gebrauchtes Fahrrad anschaffen.
Im Büro werden wir einen Drucker anschaffen.
ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsən balt ˈaɪ̯nən ˈnɔɪ̯ən ˈkyːlʃʁaŋk ˈanʃafən/
/ziː vɪl zɪç aɪ̯n gəˈbʁaʊ̯xtəs ˈfaːʁʁaːt ˈanʃafən/
/ɪm byˈʁoː ˈveːʁdən viːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən ˈdʁʊkɐ ˈanʃafən/
en: I finally want to get some headphones.
We need to get a new fridge soon.
She wants to get a used bicycle.
At the office, we will get a printer.
